semantic: consumes all message types, service interfaces, and display types defined here
owns dashboardModel as a field; forwards key messages and result messages to it; reads dashboard.filter and dashboard.currentDate
owns channelsModel as a field; forwards key messages to it; reads channels.channels for filter resolution
owns helpModel as a field; forwards key messages when showHelp is true
calls SourceFilter.IsEmpty and SourceFilter.FilterLabel in status bar render; passes SourceFilter to refreshFilteredCmd and summarizeFilteredCmd
uses spinnerStyle, loadingStyle, errorStyle, activeTabStyle, inactiveTabStyle, statusBarStyle, helpDescStyle
matches global keys singleton for Quit, Help, Refresh, Summarize, Tab
reads channels and message summaries, creates and deletes channels via store interface
calls RefreshAll and RefreshFiltered on optional refresh service
calls SummarizeUnsummarized and SummarizeFiltered on optional summarize service
